title: Guard Villagers TACZ Support
description: allows guard villagers to properly wield TACZ weapons
body:
This mod adds a compatibility layer for [Guard Villagers](https://modrinth.com/mod/guard-villagers) and [[UNOFFICIAL] TaCZ 1.21.1 NeoForge Port](https://modrinth.com/mod/tacz-1.21.1). Guard Villagers are now able to properly hold and fire TACZ weapons at enemies and defend their bases better. 

**Guard Villagers that hold TACZ weapons will:**
- target hostile entities at a range
- consume ammo (ammo condensed in ammo boxes also work) 
- retreat to search for food to heal and retrieve appropriate ammo in vanilla block entities (chests, barrels, etc)
- reposition to find the proper line of sight to the target
- avoid firing on passive friendly entities (the player, other villagers, chickens, etc)

**Other things:**
- TACZ addons that add new weapons and ammo types work as well.
- Guard villagers do not innately become smarter, their targeting behavior and conditions are still very closely linked to [Guard Villager](https://modrinth.com/mod/guard-villagers)'s original implemention and configuration.
